# Vendored frontend assets

| File | Source | Version | License |
|---|---|---|---|
| `htmx.min.js` | https://unpkg.com/htmx.org@2.0.4/dist/htmx.min.js | 2.0.4 | BSD-2-Clause |

These are vendored (not loaded from CDN at runtime) so the UI works offline
and so the constitution's "no build step" + "default-loopback safe" can be honored.
